title: Embeddium plus
description: Client-side optimizing modpack based on Embeddium
body:
![1](https://i.imgur.com/DgTdvKj.png)

------------ [Embeddium plus](https://modrinth.com/modpack/embeddium-plus) — a client-side optimization modpack based on the Embeddium mod (a fork of Sodium for Forge). It includes a carefully selected collection of mods aimed at maximizing performance in Minecraft. The modpack minimizes system load, allowing the game to run smoother and faster even on low-end devices. Similar to the popular [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) modpack available on Modrinth and CurseForge, we offer a comparable experience for Forge users, focusing on stability and performance. ![fps comparison](https://i.imgur.com/UTqLJAA.png) The included mods can be viewed here: [click](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1MgeRXElm214GfnYzf8Bzej--Mt2lzGqWtctiV0gJi0A/edit?usp=sharing) ## 🐛 How to Report Issues To report bugs, crashes and other issues, please go to [my discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) and post the issue in chat! ## 💬 Community Join our [community on the discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) to chat, ask questions, or share your creations!
